THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATASSI, MARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 355 SERRANO #MJ, STAYED UNTIL DEC-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF TO KEEP ANY DEPOSITS. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF AMY HAVE AMENDED JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
